name: nogara--chief-feature
description: Create and implement new features in Chief-managed projects using the Chief CLI. Use when asked to create a new PRD, implement a feature with Chief, set up a worktree and branch for a new feature, or open a PR for a Chief-implemented feature. Triggers on phrases like "create a new PRD", "implement this feature with Chief", "run Chief for a feature", "new feature request", or any workflow involving Chief's interactive PRD creation and AI-driven implementation loop.
